mapper.select: SELECT SUBSTR(#{upDeptId}, 1, 5) || LPAD(COALESCE(MAX(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(DEPT_ID, 6, 3))), 0) + 1, 3, '0') FROM DEPARTMENT WHERE UP_DEPT_ID = #{upDeptId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DEPARTMENT ( TENANT_ID, DEPT_NM, USE_YN, DEPT_ID, UP_DEPT_ID, SORT_NUM ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{deptNm}, COALESCE(#{useYn}, 'Y'), #{deptId}, #{upDeptId}, ( SELECT COALESCE(MAX(SORT_NUM), 0) + 1 FROM DEPARTMENT WHERE TENANT_ID IS NOT DISTINCT FROM #{tenantId} AND ( (UP_DEPT_ID = #{upDeptId}) OR (UP_DEPT_ID IS NULL AND #{upDeptId} IS NULL) ) ) )
mapper.select: SELECT TENANT_ID, DEPT_NM, USE_YN, DEPT_ID, UP_DEPT_ID FROM DEPARTMENT ORDER BY TENANT_ID, DEPT_ID
SELECT TENANT_ID, DEPT_NM, USE_YN, DEPT_ID, UP_DEPT_ID FROM DEPARTMENT WHERE TENANT_ID = #{tenantId} ORDER BY DEPT_ID
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM USERS WHERE DEPT_ID = #{deptId} AND COALESCE(RSGNTN_YN, 'N') = 'N'

SELECT COALESCE(P.DEPT_NM, D.DEPT_NM) AS division, D.DEPT_NM AS department, D.DEPT_ID, D.UP_DEPT_ID, D.USE_YN, D.SORT_NUM, COUNT(U.USER_ID) AS usercount FROM DEPARTMENT D LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT P ON D.UP_DEPT_ID = P.DEPT_ID LEFT JOIN USERS U ON D.DEPT_ID = U.DEPT_ID WHERE D.USE_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY COALESCE(P.DEPT_NM, D.DEPT_NM), D.DEPT_NM, D.DEPT_ID, D.UP_DEPT_ID, D.USE_YN, D.SORT_NUM ORDER BY division, department
